title: PET ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NO PET LEFT BEHIND PET ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial assistance with necessary veterinary procedures. The amount will depend on available funding. Also provides pet supplies such as food, coats, and other items depending on availability. Eligibility: Individuals with low or no income Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 778-6328 Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 778-6328 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Pet supplies: None required at intake Veterinary care assistance: Proof of denial of Care Credit, a screenshot of the denial letter is sufficient AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Pet Care Supplies Pet Food Veterinary Care Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
